title: Felted Diorama
description: Ce style imite l'esthétique tactile et chaleureuse des miniatures artisanales en laine feutrée à l'aiguille. Il se caractérise par des textures de fibres denses et mates avec des poils rebelles accrochant une lumière de studio douce et diffuse, mis en valeur par une profondeur de champ de macrophotographie qui floute le premier plan et l'arrière-plan. La palette de couleurs s'appuie sur des pastels doux et joyeux, créant une atmosphère d'animation en volume chaleureuse, innocente et hautement texturée.
description_en: This style mimics the tactile, cozy aesthetic of handcrafted needle-felted wool miniatures. It features dense, matted fiber textures with stray hairs catching soft, diffused studio light, enhanced by a macro photography depth of field that blurs the foreground and background. The color palette relies on gentle, cheerful pastels, creating a warm, innocent, and highly textured stop-motion animation atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style imite l'esthétique tactile et chaleureuse des miniatures artisanales en laine feutrée à l'aiguille. Il se caractérise par des textures de fibres denses et mates avec des poils rebelles accrochant une lumière de studio douce et diffuse, mis en valeur par une profondeur de champ de macrophotographie qui floute le premier plan et l'arrière-plan. La palette de couleurs s'appuie sur des pastels doux et joyeux, créant une atmosphère d'animation en volume chaleureuse, innocente et hautement texturée.
prompt: Photorealistic 3D render of a handcrafted needle-felted wool diorama. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The visual execution must simulate dense, matted wool fibers with a highly tactile, fuzzy surface. Every element is constructed from dry-felted wool, featuring rounded, soft geometric forms with no sharp edges or hard drawn lines. Colors blend organically as if tufts of dyed roving were poked together with a felting needle. Individual stray microscopic wool hairs and fuzz fringe the silhouettes, catching gentle rim light. The lighting is soft, diffused high-key studio illumination that creates gentle core shadows and subtle subsurface scattering through the porous wool material, mimicking a miniature set. The finish is entirely matte, devoid of any glossy or specular highlights, emphasizing a cozy, warm, and innocent atmosphere. The color palette is bright, cheerful, and pastel-leaning, utilizing {{primary_color}} as the dominant hue, accented by {{accent_color}} details and {{secondary_color}} supporting tones. Employ a distinct macro photography aesthetic with an extremely shallow depth of field; foreground elements and the distant background must dissolve into soft, creamy bokeh, enforcing a miniature stop-motion animation scale. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners., needle felting, matted wool texture, handcrafted miniature diorama, macro photography, shallow depth of field, soft pastel lighting, fuzzy edges, stop-motion aesthetic, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
background_prompt: A pure background scene of a handcrafted needle-felted wool landscape. Soft, rolling, rounded mounds and abstract organic shapes constructed entirely from dense, matted fuzzy wool. The environment features a bright, cheerful pastel palette dominated by {{primary_color}}, with {{accent_color}} accents on the peaks and {{secondary_color}} in the gentle, shallow crevices. Soft, diffused high-key studio lighting highlights individual stray microscopic wool fibers catching the rim light. Executed with a macro photography aesthetic, featuring an extremely shallow depth of field where the extreme foreground and distant background dissolve into heavy, creamy bokeh. Completely matte finish with no specular highlights. No specific subjects, no borders, no frames.
